ddls:
CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject of the question */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the question (e.g., Easy, Medium, Hard) */,
  "question_type" INTEGER /* Type of the question (e.g., Multiple Choice, Short Answer, Essay) */,
  "correct_answer" TEXT /* Correct answer to the question */,
  "explanation" TEXT /* Explanation for the correct answer */,
  "standard_reference" TEXT /* Reference to educational standards */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the question */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the question was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the question */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the question was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the question */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the question (e.g., textbook, exam) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for additional categorization */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the question is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_question_type FOREIGN KEY ("question_type") REFERENCES question_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_difficulty_level FOREIGN KEY ("difficulty_level") REFERENCES difficulty_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject (e.g., Science, Math) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the subject is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the subject was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the subject was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "difficulty_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difficulty level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the difficulty level (e.g., Easy, Medium, Hard) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the difficulty level */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the difficulty level is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the difficulty level was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the difficulty level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the question type (e.g., Multiple Choice, Short Answer, Essay) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the question type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the question type is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the question type was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the question type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was administered */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the test */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the test was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the test */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the test is active */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the test is archived */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the test (e.g., practice, final) */,
  "passing_score" REAL /* Minimum score required to pass the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_questions" (
  "test_question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test-question relationship */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the question in the test */,
  "points" REAL /* Points assigned to the question */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the question is active in the test */,
  "is_optional" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the question is optional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_questions_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_questions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the student belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the student record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the student record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the student record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the student record was last updated */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the student is active */,
  "parent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the student's parent or guardian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., Science 101, Math 202) */,
  "grade_level" INTEGER /* Grade level of the class */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher assigned to the class */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the class record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the class record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the class record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the class record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the class is active */,
  "class_size" INTEGER /* Number of students in the class */,
  "class_location" TEXT /* Physical location of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "teacher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the teacher specializes in */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the teacher record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the teacher record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the teacher record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the teacher record was last updated */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the teacher */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the teacher */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the teacher is active */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the teacher */,
  "teaching_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of teaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test response */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the student's response */,
  "time_taken" TEXT /* Time taken by the student to answer the question */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the response is correct */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided to the student */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the response was recorded */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the response has been flagged for review */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the response */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the response was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_responses_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_responses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_responses_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test score */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "total_score" REAL /* Total score achieved by the student */,
  "percentage_score" REAL /* Percentage score achieved by the student */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the score was recorded */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the score has been flagged for review */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the score */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the score was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., teacher, admin, student) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
